content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24,037 with broad sectoral rotation into Pharma (+2.5%), Auto (+0.7%), Metal, and Capital Goods on a flurry of Q4 earnings beats. VIX moderate at 17.8, US markets supportive overnight (+0.8% S&P). Book is well-deployed at 54% with 11 CNC names, mostly green. Priority is position management and SL trailing on winners rather than stacking new entries — book already has Capital Goods cluster (HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE), Financial Services cluster (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS), and Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.3%, CMP 1046, SL already at 1030 (breakeven+). Stock has been consolidating 1043-1062 today after Apr-21 results pop. SL at 1030 is ~1.5% below CMP — adequate trail gap. No-op MODIFY would waste signal; keeping current SL/target. Actually this IS a no-op, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -0.9%, CMP 123.97 vs entry 125.10. Gold ETF behaving as expected hedge; SL 119 (~4% below) appropriate for low-vol instrument. No catalyst to act."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.7%, CMP 1727 (down -0.9% intraday, faded from ATH 1748). SL 1710 already locks ~0.6% gain. However, promoter 2% block sale today (Rs 7,486 Cr) is bearish overhang for 1-3 sessions. SL at 1710 is just ~1% below CMP — adequate. No-op, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Promoter block-sale overhang acknowledged; SL at 1710 (~1% below CMP) already locks gain and absorbs typical post-block weakness. Will reassess if breaks 1718 intraday low."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.2%, CMP 4627. SL 4600 is breakeven+0.5% from entry 4575. CRITICAL: Q4 board meeting May 14 (6 sessions away) — outside immediate 3-session binary window but approaching. Will tighten further as event nears. Current SL 4600 is ~0.6% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. No-op currently, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 result May 14 is 6 sessions away — outside 3-session binary rule. SL 4600 locks small gain. Will reassess and tighten as event nears (May 11-12)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.0%, CMP 7024. SL 6960 is breakeven+0.9%. SRF Q4 +11% PAT confirms sector momentum; Chemours commissioning end-June is upcoming catalyst. Current SL 6960 is ~0.9% below CMP — within trail discipline. No-op, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Sector tailwind (SRF Q4 beat, specialty chemicals theme intact). SL 6960 locks small gain at adequate trail-gap (0.9% below CMP). Hold for target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.6%, CMP 843. Stock gapped up 9.6% today on Naval Systems Falta approval. Trailing SL from 825 → 832 (still ~1.3% below CMP — within 1% floor compliance). Locks ~-0.7% from entry but allows room above today's intraday low 830.55. Capex+rail theme intact; target 900 (~6.7% upside from CMP)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.6%, CMP 366.50, SL 362 (~1.2% below CMP — within trail discipline). Q4 was strong (PAT +30% YoY, Morgan Stanley TP 320 → already exceeded; Motilal TP 325). Stock at 52w high zone, consolidating. Hold for target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.5%, CMP 827.75. Stock surged +5.5% today on Q4 beat (PAT +14-18%, India volume +9%). SL 818 is 1.2% below CMP — adequate trail gap. JM Financial TP 875 supports upside. Hold for target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.3%, CMP 1271.90. SL 1265 already ~0.5% below CMP — within tight trail. No-op, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +144% QoQ (one-time tax benefit caveat), Cigniti merger record date May 16. SL 1265 locks small gain. Stock came off intraday high 1295 — caution but thesis intact. Hold for target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.6%, CMP 2995, SL 2950 (~1.5% below CMP). Stock +7.8% today recovering from Monday's -3.4% drop. Defence basket momentum intact, but Ashika TP 2730 already exceeded — limited fundamental upside. Holding to original SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 790.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.1%, CMP 803.05. Stock +9.9% today on Q4 beat (revenue +11%, EBITDA margin 46.5% record). Trailing SL 780 → 790 (still 1.6% below CMP — adequate trail-gap). Tightens loss tail by Rs 10/share given Q4 was strong and stock holding above 800. Target 855 unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1030 locks gain; consolidating in tight range. Will tighten if breaks above 1062."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL 825 → 832 to lock breakeven after gap-up; trail-gap 1.3% below CMP compliant."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 790.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL 780 → 790 after +9.9% Q4 result move; trail-gap 1.6% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M (Q4 PAT +48.5%, SUV leader) and AUROPHARMA (52w high breakout) are attractive but adding either would push portfolio deployed >65% with 11 names already. WOCKPHARMA +21.7% is event-pop (Zaynich pipeline) — too extended to chase. SRF would breach Chemicals cluster discipline (NAVINFLUOR already held). GRSE+TITAGARH+HAL already constitute Defence/Capital Goods cluster — declining further additions. NIFTYBEES not needed; book is already broad-equity exposed.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is healthy: 11 CNC positions, 9 green / 2 marginally red, total unrealized +Rs 7,352. Cluster check: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS = ~22% of capital), Capital Goods/Defence (HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE = ~17%), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR = ~5%). All within 35% sector cap. HAL Q4 May 14 needs SL tightening before May 11. HFCL pending BUY (504min old) — that's an MIS limit at 133.50; given session is 13:11 with 2h to close and no MIS hygiene to keep stale, will let it expire naturally. Cumulative experiment P&L still slightly negative (-Rs 3,173 realized + Rs 7,352 unrealized = +Rs 4,179 mark-to-market). Win rate 14% over rolling 5 days is poor — focus on letting winners run via disciplined trailing rather than churning."
}
